name: current_dashboard
short_description: Get the current Project summary dashboard
full_help:
current_dashboard

Description: 
Get the current Project summary dashboard

Syntax: 
current_dashboard  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<dashboard>...]

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<dashboard>]  Specify the dashboard to be set as current_dashboard

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
